description: Backend API Integration - Replace all mock data with real API calls to Python backend, implementing type-safe API client with error handling, loading states, caching, and validation

userStories.title: Create base API client with fetch wrapper
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a type-safe API client to make HTTP requests to the backend.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement get() method with URL params support
Implement post() method with JSON body
Implement put() method with JSON body
Add base URL from NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL env var

userStories.title: Add request/response interceptors to API client
userStories.description: As a developer, I need interceptors for auth headers and error handling.
acceptanceCriteria: Add request interceptor to inject auth token from localStorage
Add response interceptor to handle common HTTP errors
Implement 401 handler that clears auth token
Implement 403 handler that shows permission error

userStories.title: Implement retry logic with exponential backoff
userStories.description: As a developer, I need automatic retry for failed requests to handle transient errors.
acceptanceCriteria: Add retry logic in API client for failed requests
Only retry on 5xx errors and network errors
Add X-Retry-Count header to track retries
userStories.notes: Retry logic with exponential backoff implemented. X-Retry-Count header added. Only retries 5xx errors and network errors, not 4xx client errors.

userStories.title: Create TypeScript types for API requests and responses
userStories.description: As a developer, I need TypeScript interfaces for all API types.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/api/types.ts with all API interfaces

userStories.title: Add environment variables configuration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need environment variables to configure API connections.
acceptanceCriteria: Add validation function to check required env vars on app startup
Update README.md with environment setup instructions

userStories.title: Create system status API endpoints module
userStories.description: As a developer, I need organized API endpoint functions for system status.
acceptanceCriteria: Each function has full TypeScript types and JSDoc comments

userStories.title: Create evolution API endpoints module
userStories.description: As a developer, I need API endpoint functions for evolution data.
acceptanceCriteria: Each function has full TypeScript types and JSDoc comments

userStories.title: Create trades and signals API endpoints module
userStories.description: As a developer, I need API endpoint functions for trading data.
acceptanceCriteria: Each function has full TypeScript types and JSDoc comments

userStories.title: Create portfolio, performance, and markets API endpoints modules
userStories.description: As a developer, I need API endpoint functions for portfolio, performance, and market data.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/api/endpoints/portfolio.ts with getMetrics(), getEquityHistory(), getPnlHistory()
Create src/lib/api/endpoints/markets.ts with getOverview(), getMarketData(), getTrend()
Each function has full TypeScript types and JSDoc comments

userStories.title: Create loading skeleton components
userStories.description: As a user, I need visual feedback when data is loading.
acceptanceCriteria: Add Skeleton component with className and variant props
Add DataTableSkeleton component with rowCount prop
Add CardSkeleton component for dashboard cards
Add ChartSkeleton component for chart placeholders
Add TableSkeleton component for table rows
Use shadcn/ui Skeleton component as base
Verify in browser that skeletons render smoothly

userStories.title: Create error state component with retry
userStories.description: As a user, I need helpful error messages when API calls fail.
acceptanceCriteria: Add ErrorState component with error, retry, and fallback props
Add retry button with RefreshCw icon
Add optional fallback UI prop for custom error display
Verify in browser that error states display correctly

userStories.title: Update useDashboardData to use real API calls
userStories.description: As a user, I need to see real trading data instead of mock data.
acceptanceCriteria: Update src/hooks/useDashboardData.ts to call real API endpoints
Add error state (Error | null) to hook
Add refetch() function for manual refresh
Handle API errors with fallback to last known good data
Use Promise.all to fetch portfolio, trades, metrics in parallel
Replace all mock data returns with API calls
Verify in browser that real data displays

userStories.title: Update useEvolutionData to use real API calls
userStories.description: As a user, I need to see real evolution metrics instead of mock data.
acceptanceCriteria: Update src/hooks/useEvolutionData.ts to call real API endpoints
Add error state (Error | null) to hook
Add refetch() function for manual refresh
Handle API errors with fallback to cached data
Fetch metrics, history, features, mutations in parallel
Replace all mock data returns with API calls
Verify in browser that real evolution data displays

userStories.title: Update dashboard components to use loading/error states
userStories.description: As a user, I need visual feedback for loading and error states.
acceptanceCriteria: Update EnhancedActiveTradesTable to show DataTableSkeleton when loading
Update EnhancedActiveTradesTable to show ErrorState on error
Update EvolutionMetrics to show CardSkeleton when loading
Update EvolutionMetrics to show ErrorState on error
Update PerformanceMetrics to show CardSkeleton when loading
Update all chart components to show ChartSkeleton when loading
Update all components to display error messages from hook
Verify in browser that loading states transition smoothly

userStories.title: Implement in-memory API cache with TTL
userStories.description: As a user, I need the dashboard to load quickly by caching frequently accessed data.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement get(key) method that returns null for expired items
Implement set(key, data, ttl) method with TTL in seconds
Implement invalidate(pattern) method to delete matching keys
Implement clear() method to clear all cache

userStories.title: Integrate caching into API client
userStories.description: As a user, I need fast page loads from cached data.
acceptanceCriteria: Add cache option to API client get() method
Cache GET requests by default (opt-out with cache: false)
Add cache warming on app startup for common endpoints
Log cache stats in development mode

userStories.title: Create Zod schemas for API response validation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need runtime validation to ensure API responses match expected types.
acceptanceCriteria: Install zod package if not present
Add SystemStatusSchema with all required fields

userStories.title: Integrate Zod validation into API client
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to validate API responses at runtime.
acceptanceCriteria: Add generic schema parameter to API client methods
Validate responses in response interceptor using Zod parse()
Log validation errors with full response details
Return safe default values when validation fails
Add option to disable validation for development
Throw ValidationError with details for failed validation

userStories.title: Implement API request/response logging
userStories.description: As a developer, I need detailed logging to debug API issues.
acceptanceCriteria: Add logRequest() method that logs method, URL, params
Add logResponse() method that logs status, data, duration
Add logError() method that logs full error details
Add request timing (start time, end time, duration)
Add correlation ID generation for request tracking
Implement log level filtering (error, warn, info, debug)
Enable verbose logging in development mode
Sanitize sensitive data (tokens, passwords) from logs
